chunks.title: Miriam and Aaron challenge Moses
chunks.reason: Describes the complaint against Moses regarding his Cushite wife and introduces Moses' humility.

chunks.title: Yahweh's judgment on Miriam and Aaron
chunks.reason: Records the divine summons, Yahweh's speech distinguishing Moses from other prophets, and the resulting anger.

chunks.title: Miriam struck with leprosy and Aaron pleads
chunks.reason: Narrates the physical manifestation of Miriam's disease and Aaron's intercession to Moses.

chunks.title: Moses' prayer and resolution
chunks.reason: Contains Moses' prayer for healing, Yahweh's decree of seven days isolation, and the conclusion of the event.
